presentation-quality.requirement: Shows calculation formulas explicitly (e.g., "EV = Win% × Reward - Loss% × Risk") not just stating final numbers

presentation-quality.requirement: Maintains objective analytical tone focusing on risk metrics and probability calculations
presentation-quality.explanation: The response maintains an objective, analytical tone throughout, emphasizing quantified risk limits, max loss/profit, POP estimates, EV, Kelly criterion, and risk-of-ruin calculations.
